name: Italian Garlic/Pepper Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup Parmesan Cheese, up to 1 Cup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the water, salt, sugar, bread flour, and yeast. Mix well.
2. Stir in the garlic powder and pepper until evenly distributed.
3. Gradually add the Parmesan cheese (up to 1 cup) and mix until crumbled into small pieces.
4. Continue mixing until the dough is smooth and elastic.
5. Turn off the mixer or stir by hand to prevent the islands of cheese from getting ground into the dough.
6. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased bowl.
7. Cover and let rise in a warm place for about 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
8. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown and hollow-sounding when tapped.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack before slicing.
